chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3730 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "يَا مَعْشَرَ اَلتُّجَّارِ صُونُوا أَمْوَالَكُمْ بِالصَّدَقَةِ تُكَفَّرْ عَنْكُمْ ذُنُوبُكُمْ وَ أَيْمَانَكُمُ اَلَّتِي تَحْلِفُونَ فِيهَا تُطَيَّبْ لَكُمْ تِجَارَتُكُمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3730 - Imam (as) said: "O group of traders, protect your wealth through charity, your sins will be forgiven, and the oaths you make will be purified for you-thus your trade will be blessed."
